display.purpose: Hero tagline on the welcome screen only. Never used inside the app shell.

headline.purpose: Section titles, drawer names, prominent labels. One per view.

title.purpose: Sidebar headings, card titles, modal headers.

body.purpose: Main reading text, button labels, input values, list items.

label.purpose: Hints, helper text, timestamps, small annotations.

mono.purpose: Data values, code references, attendance percentages.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift for standalone content cards.

motion.name: ease-expo-out
motion.purpose: Exponential ease-out for wizard transitions and progress bar (350-600ms).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Quick feedback: hover, active, focus states.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: panel slides, drawer opens, step content fades.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Enter transitions: overlay opacity, drawer transform.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses to slide-in overlay. Layout goes single-column.

breakpoints.name: model-grid
breakpoints.purpose: Selection cards switch from stacked to auto-fill grid.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. One per view. Tinta Azul background, white text, 8px radius, subtle hover lift.
components.html:
<button class="ds-btn-primary">
  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="ds-btn-icon"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg>
  Comenzar
</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: var(--accent); border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(29,78,216,0.25); transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(29,78,216,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.99); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary .ds-btn-icon { transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon { transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with accent text and border. For non-primary commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--accent); background: transparent; border: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--accent-subtle); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with warm border, 8px radius, and accent focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .ds-label { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-primary); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border-default); border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-tertiary); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-ring); } .ds-input-error { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--danger-text); margin: 0; min-height: 1em; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Course navigation item in the sidebar. Shows course name with student count badge.
components.html: 1ro B ESN5 24
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); background: transparent; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--text-primary); } .ds-sidebar-item.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; } .ds-sidebar-icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--text-tertiary); } .ds-sidebar-item.active .ds-sidebar-icon { color: var(--accent); } .ds-sidebar-label { flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-sidebar-badge { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--surface); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Selection Card
components.description: Interactive card for selecting a model or report variant. 2px border, hover and selected states.
components.html:
Recomendado

Gemma 4

Modelo cloud rapido y preciso. Requiere inicio de sesion en Ollama.
components.css: .ds-selection-card { display: block; padding: 16px; border: 2px solid var(--border-default); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-selection-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); } .ds-selection-card[aria-checked="true"] { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-ring); } .ds-rec-badge { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--success-bg); color: var(--success-text); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-selection-card:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--accent-ring); }

components.name: Student Drawer
components.description: Slide-in panel from the right edge showing student detail and report editor. 520px wide with backdrop overlay.
components.html: Aguilar, SANTINO
components.css: .ds-drawer-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-drawer { width: 520px; max-width: 90vw; height: 100%; background: var(--surface); border-left: 2px solid var(--border-default); box-shadow: -8px 0 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; animation: dsDrawerIn 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) both; } @keyframes dsDrawerIn { from { transform: translateX(100%); } to { transform: translateX(0); } } .ds-drawer-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-subtle); } .ds-drawer-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-drawer-title { font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); margin: 0; } .ds-drawer-nav-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-secondary); transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-drawer-nav-btn:hover { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); } .ds-drawer-close { composes: ds-drawer-nav-btn; } .ds-drawer-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-drawer-textarea { width: 100%; min-height: 180px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-primary); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border-default); border-radius: 8px; resize: vertical; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-drawer-textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-ring); } .ds-drawer-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-drawer-action { padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-action-primary { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; } .ds-action-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .ds-action-secondary { background: transparent; color: var(--accent); border: 2px solid var(--accent); } .ds-action-secondary:hover { background: var(--accent-subtle); }

components.name: Wizard Progress Bar
components.description: Three-step progress indicator for the report wizard. Active step in accent, completed in success, future steps muted.
components.html:
Cuestionario
Configuracion
Informe
components.css: .ds-wizard-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0; background: transparent; } .ds-wiz-step { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-tertiary); background: transparent; cursor: default; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-wiz-step.ds-wiz-active { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; } .ds-wiz-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-wiz-label { white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Observation Code Badge
components.description: Attendance code badge in the observation log. Color-coded pill representing student status (P=presente, A=ausente, etc.)
components.html: 15/3 P Participo activamente en clase
components.css: .ds-obs-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 100px 90px 1fr 40px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: var(--font-body); transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-obs-row:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P"] { background: var(--tint-success-row); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="A"] { background: var(--tint-info-subtle); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P-EXC"] { background: var(--tint-secondary-row); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P-X"] { background: var(--tint-warning-row); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="T"] { background: var(--tint-default-row); } .ds-obs-date { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--text-secondary); } .ds-obs-code { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; width: fit-content; } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P"] .ds-obs-code { background: var(--success-bg); border-color: var(--success-border); color: var(--success-text); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="A"] .ds-obs-code { background: var(--info-bg); border-color: var(--info-border); color: var(--info-text); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P-EXC"] .ds-obs-code { background: var(--secondary-subtle); border-color: rgba(8,145,178,0.2); color: var(--secondary-hover); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="P-X"] .ds-obs-code { background: var(--warning-bg); border-color: var(--warning-border); color: var(--warning-text); } .ds-obs-row[data-code="T"] .ds-obs-code { background: var(--surface-subtle); border-color: var(--border-hover); color: var(--text-secondary); } .ds-obs-text { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-primary); } .ds-obs-remove { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-tertiary); transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-obs-remove:hover { background: var(--tint-danger); color: var(--danger-text); }

narrative.overview:
InformesCreator is the teacher's desk: a tidy, well-organized workspace where everything has its place. Calm surfaces, clear tools, nothing demands attention that hasn't earned it. The interface feels like a well-organized colleague who has done this before: calm under pressure, clear about next steps, never making you guess.

Warmth lives in the materials (creamy paper backgrounds, soft grays, blue ink accents) not in decorative flourishes. Efficiency lives in the task layout (progressive disclosure, focused wizard steps, one thing at a time) not in density or speed.

This system explicitly rejects the gray-on-gray enterprise dashboard, the cold SaaS panel, the 12-level nested menu.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-like warmth: surfaces in warm off-whites, never cold grays or sterile white
Clear hierarchy without visual noise: one primary action per view, revealed progressively
Quiet confidence: animations confirm actions, they do not entertain
Argentine classroom native: Spanish-language UI, local terminology, culturally aware
Accessible by default: WCAG 2.1 AA, keyboard navigable, reduced-motion respected

rules.name: The Tinta Azul Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on 10% or less of any given screen. It appears on buttons, active nav items, and focus indicators. If a screen looks blue, the rule is broken. Rarity is what gives the accent its signal value.

rules.name: The Warm Ground Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries a trace of warmth. No #F5F5F5, no #E0E0E0, no pure cool grays.

rules.name: The One-Family-Plus Rule
rules.body: App UI uses Nunito for hierarchy and Inter for everything else. There is no display/body pairing for the app shell.

rules.name: The Line Length Rule
rules.body: Prose body text never exceeds 75 characters per line. Compact data views may run longer at the designer's discretion.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows signal an interaction, not a hierarchy.

dos: Do use Tinta Azul sparingly. One primary action per view, one active item per list.
Do use warm neutrals (Papel Crema, Gris Suave, Borde Tierra) for all backgrounds and borders.
Do keep interactive surfaces flat at rest. Shadows are for hover feedback only.
Do animate with purpose: state transitions, feedback, and progress indication.
Do prefer inline and progressive disclosure over modals.
Do respect the teacher's task rhythm. Never show a wall of 30 options.
Do write every label, placeholder, error, and tooltip in Argentine Spanish.
donts: Don't use the accent color decoratively.
Don't over-elevate. Use tonal layering before shadows.
Don't animate layout properties. Use transform and opacity.
Don't use display fonts (Nunito) in UI labels, button text, or data values.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent).
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects.
Don't show a modal when a progressive alternative exists.
Don't make the teacher hunt. Every screen has one primary action.
Don't use color as the sole indicator of state.
Don't interrupt the questionnaire flow with delight animations.
